--- ███████████ ████ wrote:

Good morning....

I organize personal for exhibitions….

I provide clients with well-educated, nice,
beautiful girls with good knowledge of foreign
languages. They work with customers, they promote
products…..they smile and attract people to
the stand with their appearance. Now I’m
working on my web-side …

So trying to find good alternative to other
advertising, pr agencies. Our girls not only
beautiful they are also smart, well-educated who
could easily support any conversation……

Actually i do many other small things....like i
have
2 underwear shops and some real estate ))) in
Blagoveschensk, do you know this city? ...located
on
the border with china and the city will be soon
free
economic zone..... very interesting........

So...every body should start with small steps and
big wishes ))

My travel plans..... still really wanna go to ny
in
the near future...i've booked my ticket already
will
see........ but haven't found a place to stay yet.

What about you? Where are you today?

looking forward to seeing you.....

take care

██████
